how_to_use: Apply 3–4 drops to clean, dry skin in the morning before moisturiser. Gently pat onto face and neck. Always follow with SPF during the day. Use daily for best results. Avoid mixing with retinol in the same routine.
key_benefits: Brightens skin tone, fades dark spots, boosts collagen, protects against free radicals

how_to_use: Apply a pea-sized amount to clean face and neck morning and evening. Warm between fingertips before pressing gently into skin. Can be layered over serum.
key_benefits: Deep hydration for 72 hours, strengthens skin barrier, plumps fine lines

how_to_use: Wet face with warm water. Apply a small amount and lather for 30–60 seconds using circular motions. Rinse thoroughly with lukewarm water. Use morning and evening. Follow with toner and moisturiser.
key_benefits: Unclogs pores, reduces breakouts, controls excess oil, calms redness

how_to_use: After cleansing, soak a cotton pad and gently sweep across face and neck. Alternatively, press a small amount into skin with clean hands. Use morning and evening before serum and moisturiser.
key_benefits: Minimises pores, balances oil production, gently exfoliates, refreshes skin

how_to_use: Apply generously as the last step of your morning skincare routine, 15–20 minutes before sun exposure. Use 1/4 teaspoon for face alone. Reapply every 2 hours when outdoors or after swimming/sweating.
key_benefits: Broad spectrum UVA/UVB protection, lightweight formula, no white cast, moisturising

how_to_use: Use only at night. Apply after cleansing and toning on completely dry skin. Start with 2–3 nights per week to allow skin to adjust, then increase to nightly use. Always use SPF the following morning. Not suitable during pregnancy.
key_benefits: Reduces fine lines and wrinkles, boosts collagen, improves skin texture, anti-ageing

how_to_use: Apply a thin layer directly to individual blemishes only (not all over face). Use once daily at night, after cleansing. Start every other day to test skin tolerance. Can cause dryness — follow with a light moisturiser.
key_benefits: Kills acne-causing bacteria, reduces size of pimples overnight, prevents new breakouts

how_to_use: Apply with a foundation brush, sponge, or fingers starting from the centre of the face and blending outwards. Build coverage as desired — light for natural look, full for events. Set with powder for all-day wear. Available in 30 shades.
key_benefits: 16-hour wear, full coverage, matte finish, transfers minimally, buildable

how_to_use: Apply a small dot under each eye in a triangle shape, or directly on blemishes. Blend gently with a damp sponge or fingertip using tapping motions (not rubbing). Set with translucent powder to prevent creasing. Available in 20 shades.
key_benefits: Full coverage for dark circles and blemishes, long-wearing, crease-resistant, brightening

how_to_use: After applying foundation and concealer, dip a fluffy powder brush or powder puff into the powder. Tap off the excess, then lightly press or sweep onto face focusing on T-zone and under eyes. Can be used for baking technique under eyes.
key_benefits: Sets makeup for 12+ hours, blurs pores, eliminates shine, weightless finish

how_to_use: Start at the base of lashes and wiggle the wand upward. Apply 2–3 coats for maximum volume. For lower lashes, hold the wand vertically and use the tip. Remove with an oil-based cleanser or micellar water at the end of the day. Replace every 3 months.
key_benefits: 10x volume boost, no flaking, enriched with lash conditioners, buildable

how_to_use: Apply 2–3 pumps to damp or dry hair. For damp hair: distribute evenly from mid-lengths to ends before blow-drying. For dry hair: smooth a small amount over flyaways and ends to add shine. Do not apply to roots to avoid greasiness.
key_benefits: Eliminates frizz, adds mirror shine, protects from heat up to 230°C, nourishes hair

how_to_use: After shampooing, apply a generous amount to wet hair from mid-lengths to ends. Leave on for 10–20 minutes (use a shower cap for deeper penetration). Rinse thoroughly with lukewarm water. Use once or twice weekly for damaged hair, monthly for maintenance.
key_benefits: Repairs and strengthens damaged hair, restores moisture, reduces breakage, silky finish

how_to_use: Wet hair thoroughly. Apply a coin-sized amount, lather and massage into scalp for at least 2 minutes to allow the active ingredients to work. Rinse well. For best results use every wash for the first 2 weeks, then 2–3 times weekly for maintenance.
key_benefits: Eliminates dandruff and flakes, soothes itchy scalp, controls oil, refreshing tingle

how_to_use: Apply liberally to clean skin after showering while skin is still slightly damp. Massage in upward circular motions focusing on dry areas (elbows, knees, heels). Use morning and evening for best results. Can be used on face and body.
key_benefits: 24-hour deep moisturisation, softens rough patches, absorbs quickly, luxurious rose scent
